# Cloud Platforms

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| Azure (AKS, ACR, Azure AD, Key Vault) | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| GCP (GKE, Artifact Registry, Cloud KMS) | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- Multi-node AKS/GKE cluster provisioning with security-hardened configurations
- Workload identity, managed identities, and service account governance
- Cloud secrets management (Azure Key Vault, GCP Secret Manager, Cloud KMS)
- Container registries (ACR, Artifact Registry) with vulnerability scanning
- Network controls, private endpoints, and VNet/VPC architecture
- Cost management and resource governance
